title: Norwegian Goose Pancakes
description: A festive and savory breakfast dish that combines the flavors of Norway with a fluffy pancake, featuring a main ingredient of goose.

ingredients.name: goose breast
ingredients.notes: Cook to an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C)

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a shallow dish, mix together the tangy mustard, festive salt, and heavy cream.
Add the diced goose breast to the marinade and coat evenly.
Pan-fry the goose breast until cooked through, then set aside.
Cook the pancakes according to the mix instructions, until fluffy and golden.
Soak the pancakes in the heavy cream mixture for 2-3 minutes.
Serve the soaked pancakes with the pan-fried goose breast, and a drizzle of maple syrup if desired.
